news.title: How to make the Startup Battlefield Top 20 — and what every company gets regardless
news.summary: Every founder who applies to Startup Battlefield wants the same thing: the Disrupt Main Stage. Here’s how to get there and why the opportunity starts well before the main stage.

news.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80B to pay for AI buildout
news.summary: "The company is experiencing strong demand for its AI solutions and services from enterprises and consumers, at levels that are exceeding the company’s available supply," Alphabet said in its statement.

news.title: Defense tech darling Mach Industries hits $1.8B valuation, a 4x jump in a year
news.summary: In a wild ride for 22-year-old founder and CEO Ethan Thornton, Mach Industries has raised another $300 million. It already has five autonomous vehicles in development and completed a major acquisition.

news.title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
news.summary: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely, and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.

news.title: From the stage to the future: Where are Startup Battlefield’s alumni now?
news.summary: We wanted to show you what happens after the confetti falls. We checked in with some of our recent alumni, many of whom have sat down with us on Build Mode: The Founder Survival Guide, TechCrunch's podcast for founders at every stage.

news.title: The Google Pixel Watch 5 may have been spoiled by… the creator of Borderlands
news.summary: We may just have gotten an early look at the Google Pixel Watch 5 - and from an unusual source. news.title: Pebblebee’s Halo can help track lost items and keep you safe, and it’s on sale for $50
news.summary: If you’re planning to travel this summer, both a Bluetooth tracker and a personal safety device can come in handy, especially if you’ll be exploring on your own. The Pebblebee Halo combines those two gadgets into one, and it’s currently on sale for $49.99 ($10 off) at Amazon, which

news.title: This could be Windows’ M1 moment — but expect it to cost a ton
news.summary: Nvidia's announcement that it's getting into the consumer laptop chip space with RTX Spark is huge. news.title: Gemini’s new AI agent is about as good as Google’s demo
news.summary: Google's new "24/7" AI agent, Gemini Spark, can be shockingly good at doing things on your behalf. But I'm not sure it's worth the financial cost and potential privacy tradeoffs. news.title: Meta’s own AI was exploited to hijack Instagram accounts
news.summary: Meta's AI support chatbot helped hackers hijack Instagram accounts, as reported earlier by 404 Media. news.title: Norse Atlantic Airways Offers Dirt-Cheap Tickets. There’s a Catch
news.summary: Dozens of people have complained to the Federal Trade Commission about Norse Atlantic Airways’ tech-first customer service operation. Some said they lost thousands of dollars.

news.title: ‘Sexual Chocolate’ Faces Recalls After FDA Tests Reveal Undisclosed Viagra
news.summary: Sellers of products with names like Boner Bears and DTF have voluntarily recalled their products after testing positive for the active ingredients in Viagra and Cialis.
